findings.evidence: gold_quotes_sjc_historical.csv: 1 rows have sell < buy for buy/sell.
findings.recommendation: Inspect source/unit mapping and exclude invalid target rows from model training.

findings.evidence: pipeline_output_domestic_daily.csv: 106,008 duplicate date rows if interpreted as one-row-per-day. This table appears to be mixed source/product grain and must not be used as a daily model frame without a wider key or aggregation.
findings.recommendation: Declare the canonical grain, aggregate to one row per date before modeling, and reserve source/product rows for audit only.

findings.evidence: pipeline_output_domestic_daily.csv: 1,544 rows have sell < buy for buy_price/sell_price.
findings.recommendation: Inspect source/unit mapping and exclude invalid target rows from model training.

findings.evidence: Only 14.24% of news rows are strict_realtime_verified; most rows are backfilled.
findings.impacted_artifacts: news features; event_regime; model_frame_daily; model interpretation
findings.recommendation: Exclude backfilled news from decision/paper-trading features or run sensitivity with strict-only mode.

findings.evidence: SBV structure 137473 is classified as central_fx, not deposit_rate. No verified SBV deposit history source is present.
findings.impacted_artifacts: deposit opportunity cost features; report caveats
findings.recommendation: Keep SBV 137473 as official central FX only; use verified deposit-rate source or forward monitoring for retail rates.

findings.evidence: Retail deposit rates are forward_monitoring_only; they cannot benchmark historical 2011-2026 model returns.
findings.recommendation: Do not include deposit excess-return claims in historical backtests until verified historical deposit data exists.
Declare canonical artifact paths and stop reading ambiguous duplicate filenames.
Declare canonical artifact paths and stop reading ambiguous duplicate filenames.
